LineComment.Text: Positions :
1 : Shuttle 1 Undrilled Part
2 : Shuttle 2 Undrilled Part
3 : Gripper Undrilled Part
4 : Fixture
5 : Gripper Drilled Part
6 : Shuttle 1 Drilled Part
7 : Shuttle 2 Drilled Part
Transfert data from position 1 To 3 - Shuttle 1 to Loading Gripper
Reset data in position 1
Transfert data from position 2 To 3 - Shuttle 2 to Loading Gripper
Reset data in position 2
Transfert data from position 3 To 4 - Loading Gripper to Fixture
Reset data in position 3
Transfert data from position 4 To 5 - Fixture to Unloading Gripper
Reset data in position 4
Transfert data from position 5 To 6 - Unloading Gripper to Shuttle 1
Reset data in position 5
Transfert data from position 5 To 7 - Unloading Gripper to Shuttle 2
Reset data in position 5
Shift of the the array for the new final part
Transfert data from position 6 TO the DB final part - Shuttle 1 to DB final part
Shift of the the array for the new final part
Transfert data from position 7 TO the DB final part - Shuttle 2 to DB final part

StructuredText.Text: Condition for the Transfert Postions data

LineComment.Text: Conditions from Ext To position 1 - External Loader to Shuttle 1
Conditions from Ext To position 2 - External Loader to Shuttle 2
Conditions from position 1 To 3 - Shuttle 1 to Loading Gripper
Conditions from position 2 To 3 - Shuttle 2 to Loading Gripper
Conditions from position 3 To 4 - Loading Gripper to Fixture
Conditions from position 4 To 5 - Fixture to Unloading Gripper
Conditions from position 5 To 6 - Unloading Gripper to Shuttle 1
Conditions from position 5 To 7 - Unloading Gripper to Shuttle 2
Conditions from position 6 To Ext - Shuttle 1 to External Loader
Conditions from position 7 To Ext - Shuttle 2 to External Loader
Détection nouvelle pièce
Initialisation de la donnée de la pièce sur shuttle 1
Initialisation de la donnée de la pièce sur shuttle 2
Fail code part
Measure Z
WOZ
WOC
Counter if cycle time
M72 : Start counter of cycle time
M73 : Stop counter of cycle time
Counter of cycle laser
M71 : Start calculation laser time
M68 : Set Lasered (Tracability)
Mesure ZED Backwall PAS UTILISE SUR FL0153 A SUPPRIMER
Close unload gripper
